title: 2026 OWHA Provincial Championship Playing Rules
tiebreakers: Total points in round robin play
Record against other tied teams (win/loss record among other tied teams)
Goals scored minus the goals against in the full round robin play
Fewest goals allowed in the full round robin play
Most periods won in the full round robin play
Fewest penalty minutes in the full round robin play
First goal scored in the full round robin play

overtime.appliesTo: Quarter finals, semi-finals, and championship games only
overtime.format: 10 minute stop time sudden victory per period
overtime.endSwitch: Teams do not switch ends for 1st OT, switch after each successive period

timeout: One 30 second timeout per team per game (regulation or overtime)
